_comment.name: MDS DTC Codes grabbed from Diagbox FDB. ECUTYPE union: BSRF_2010, BTA4S_2, BTA_CN, BTA_D, RTBM, RTBM_2010. Conflicting labels resolved by majority vote across ECUTYPEs.
